TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: satukal kakiliman uyniyan a babalakasen nu adiwawa misatukal sananay, yadah ku binacadan a tademaw matingen misalama. u Amuhuan u Hulam, izaw tu mahiniay a kawaw. micakat ipabawy nu tukal, kya satukal nasanga'an nu kilang atu auk. masatezep macakat itiza, taneng muculil, taneng mupalaw, taneng miduba', caaykatulu'. hina sawsawni papalaw misatukal itiza i saungay nu binawlan atu i lisinan. nilacul u babalaksan a kawaw babalakasen nu wawa i niyazu' ku satukal, u sapilalais nu babalaki i sumamad tu Alikakay. angsi atu uway ku sasanga' tu satukal. isasa u kamu nu tumuk nu Ciwidian, hinisa; u maikesay a angsi ku sapisanga', malecaday ku batac nu puu', sapabalat henay a auk malapiemekan, nisengelan a uway ku sasiket, kelecen mibedbed, maacak ku uway kapah tu ku nikakelec, mahinisa pahezekay tu ku pisanga'. u kungku nu satukal u kungku nu Sakizaya, sumamad siluma'ay i Pazik tabakibaki takalakalaw sa, matineng aca mitima', takalaw tabaki, matineng misengi tu acawa mibalakas tu kanamuhan niza a tatayna, matineng mala macimacima a tademaw, mipahengad tu wawa, tadamanamuh mukan tu sawada' nu lutungay, milawlaw tu niyazu'ay, lihalaw ku binacadan, hicaen ku Alikakay itawya caay picumud i niyazu' sa, sanga' satu ku binacadan tu satukal a mitibac tu Alikakay, nika caay katalatalaw ku Alikakay. tuzuma satu a demiad, pasepian nu pabaway Di'tu ku tumuk, pasubana' a hicaen misuayaw, kilul han nu tumuk ku pipaayaw nu pabaway Di'tu, miala tu lucik tulik han mahiza u alubu, pazeng han i labu ku da'dac atu bila', paulic han mipes ku epah, u pulung han ku mahiniay, matalaw ku Di'tu miazih, tanutuwa' han lakilaki han miawaw, beduk satu mulaliw tayza i Taypinyang, inayi' satu ku pisamsam nu Alikakay. u kawaw nu Hulam u satukal sanay u kapahay sazumaay a pili'ay(sazumaay a pili'ÁČĻŤČ≤) a saungay nu binawlan(saungay nu binawlanśīĽŚčē). u caykaw tuud lalangawan nazikuzan kasaetiman , ahebal kya sitengil i kitakit a palaw, matenes tu ku laylay atu namihcaan. namakay nuayaw nuayaway a palaw, izaw tu ku kulit nu ba'tu. namakaycuwa tina satukal saw? u sakamuway nu binawlan, u ayaway a tademaw maydih miala tu heci nu kilang, sisa, pasiketen tu kilang atu auk i kuku' nu heni, katukuh ayza, malu satukal a kawaw tuwauy, mahiza ku kamu nu babalaki saan.
S.PHON: satukar~…ĺ kakir~…ĺiman ujnijan a babar~…ĺakas…ôn nu adiwawa misatukar~…ĺ sananaj, jadańß ku bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw matiŇč…ôn misar~…ĺama. u amuńßuan u ńßur~…ĺam, izaw tu mańßiniaj a kawaw. mi ¶akat ipabawj nu tukar~…ĺ, kja satukar~…ĺ nasaŇča Ē~ °an nu kir~…ĺaŇč atu auk. masat…ôz…ôp ma ¶akat itiza, tan…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč mupar~…ĺaw, tan…ôŇč miduba Ē~ °, ¶aajkatur~…ĺu Ē~ °. ńßina sawsawni papar~…ĺaw misatukar~…ĺ itiza i sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan atu i r~…ĺisinan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u babar~…ĺaksan a kawaw babar~…ĺakas…ôn nu wawa i nijazu Ē~ ° ku satukar~…ĺ, u sapir~…ĺar~…ĺais nu babar~…ĺaki i sumamad tu ar~…ĺikakaj. aŇčsi atu uwaj ku sasaŇča Ē~ ° tu satukar~…ĺ. isasa u kamu nu tumuk nu ¶iwidian, ńßinisa; u maik…ôsaj a aŇčsi ku sapisaŇča Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku bata ¶ nu puu Ē~ °, sapabar~…ĺat ńß…ônaj a auk mar~…ĺapi…ôm…ôkan, nis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺan a uwaj ku sasik…ôt, k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn mib…ôdb…ôd, maa ¶ak ku uwaj kapańß tu ku nikak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, mańßinisa pańß…ôz…ôkaj tu ku pisaŇča Ē~ °. u kuŇčku nu satukar~…ĺ u kuŇčku nu sakizaja, sumamad sir~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj i pazik tabakibaki takar~…ĺakar~…ĺaw sa, matin…ôŇč a ¶a mitima Ē~ °, takar~…ĺaw tabaki, matin…ôŇč mis…ôŇči tu a ¶awa mibar~…ĺakas tu kanamuńßan niza a tatajna, matin…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ma ¶ima ¶ima a tad…ômaw, mipańß…ôŇčad tu wawa, tadamanamuńß mukan tu sawada Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu nijazu Ē~ °aj, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw ku bina ¶adan, ńßi ¶a…ôn ku ar~…ĺikakaj itawja ¶aaj pi ¶umud i nijazu Ē~ ° sa, saŇča Ē~ ° satu ku bina ¶adan tu satukar~…ĺ a mitiba ¶ tu ar~…ĺikakaj, nika ¶aaj katar~…ĺatar~…ĺaw ku ar~…ĺikakaj. tuzuma satu a d…ômiad, pas…ôpian nu pabawaj di Ē~ °tu ku tumuk, pasubana Ē~ ° a ńßi ¶a…ôn misuajaw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nu tumuk ku pipaajaw nu pabawaj di Ē~ °tu, miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺu ¶ik tur~…ĺik ńßan mańßiza u ar~…ĺubu, paz…ôŇč ńßan i r~…ĺabu ku da Ē~ °da ¶ atu bir~…ĺa Ē~ °, paur~…ĺi ¶ ńßan mip…ôs ku …ôpańß, u pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku mańßiniaj, matar~…ĺaw ku di Ē~ °tu miazińß, tanutuwa Ē~ ° ńßan r~…ĺakir~…ĺaki ńßan miawaw, b…ôduk satu mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajza i tajpinjaŇč, inaji Ē~ ° satu ku pisamsam nu ar~…ĺikakaj. u kawaw nu ńßur~…ĺam u satukar~…ĺ sanaj u kapańßaj sazumaaj a pir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj(sazumaaj a pir~…ĺi Ē~ °**) a sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan(sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan**). u ¶ajkaw tuud r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nazikuzan kasa…ôtiman , ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kja sit…ôŇčir~…ĺ i kitakit a par~…ĺaw, mat…ôn…ôs tu ku r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu namińß ¶aan. namakaj nuajaw nuajawaj a par~…ĺaw, izaw tu ku kur~…ĺit nu ba Ē~ °tu. namakaj ¶uwa tina satukar~…ĺ saw? u sakamuwaj nu binawr~…ĺan, u ajawaj a tad…ômaw majdińß miar~…ĺa tu ńß…ô ¶i nu kir~…ĺaŇč, sisa, pasik…ôt…ôn tu kir~…ĺaŇč atu auk i kuku Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni, katukuńß ajza, mar~…ĺu satukar~…ĺ a kawaw tuwauj, mańßiza ku kamu nu babar~…ĺaki saan.
S.FORM: satukal kakiliman uyniyan a babalakasen nu adiwawa misatukal sananay, yadah ku binacadan a tademaw matingen misalama. u Amuhuan u Hulam, izaw tu mahiniay a kawaw. micakat ipabawy nu tukal, kya satukal nasanga'an nu kilang atu auk. masatezep macakat itiza, taneng muculil, taneng mupalaw, taneng miduba', caaykatulu'. hina sawsawni papalaw misatukal itiza i saungay nu binawlan atu i lisinan. nilacul u babalaksan a kawaw babalakasen nu wawa i niyazu' ku satukal, u sapilalais nu babalaki i sumamad tu Alikakay. angsi atu uway ku sasanga' tu satukal. isasa u kamu nu tumuk nu Ciwidian, hinisa; u maikesay a angsi ku sapisanga', malecaday ku batac nu puu', sapabalat henay a auk malapiemekan, nisengelan a uway ku sasiket, kelecen mibedbed, maacak ku uway kapah tu ku nikakelec, mahinisa pahezekay tu ku pisanga'. u kungku nu satukal u kungku nu Sakizaya, sumamad siluma'ay i Pazik tabakibaki takalakalaw sa, matineng aca mitima', takalaw tabaki, matineng misengi tu acawa mibalakas tu kanamuhan niza a tatayna, matineng mala macimacima a tademaw, mipahengad tu wawa, tadamanamuh mukan tu sawada' nu lutungay, milawlaw tu niyazu'ay, lihalaw ku binacadan, hicaen ku Alikakay itawya caay picumud i niyazu' sa, sanga' satu ku binacadan tu satukal a mitibac tu Alikakay, nika caay katalatalaw ku Alikakay. tuzuma satu a demiad, pasepian nu pabaway Di'tu ku tumuk, pasubana' a hicaen misuayaw, kilul han nu tumuk ku pipaayaw nu pabaway Di'tu, miala tu lucik tulik han mahiza u alubu, pazeng han i labu ku da'dac atu bila', paulic han mipes ku epah, u pulung han ku mahiniay, matalaw ku Di'tu miazih, tanutuwa' han lakilaki han miawaw, beduk satu mulaliw tayza i Taypinyang, inayi' satu ku pisamsam nu Alikakay. u kawaw nu Hulam u satukal sanay u kapahay sazumaay a pili'ay(sazumaay a pili'ÁČĻŤČ≤) a saungay nu binawlan(saungay nu binawlanśīĽŚčē). u caykaw tuud lalangawan nazikuzan kasaetiman , ahebal kya sitengil i kitakit a palaw, matenes tu ku laylay atu namihcaan. namakay nuayaw nuayaway a palaw, izaw tu ku kulit nu ba'tu. namakaycuwa tina satukal saw? u sakamuway nu binawlan, u ayaway a tademaw maydih miala tu heci nu kilang, sisa, pasiketen tu kilang atu auk i kuku' nu heni, katukuh ayza, malu satukal a kawaw tuwauy, mahiza ku kamu nu babalaki saan.
S.PHON: satukar~…ĺ kakir~…ĺiman ujnijan a babar~…ĺakas…ôn nu adiwawa misatukar~…ĺ sananaj, jadańß ku bina ¶adan a tad…ômaw matiŇč…ôn misar~…ĺama. u amuńßuan u ńßur~…ĺam, izaw tu mańßiniaj a kawaw. mi ¶akat ipabawj nu tukar~…ĺ, kja satukar~…ĺ nasaŇča Ē~ °an nu kir~…ĺaŇč atu auk. masat…ôz…ôp ma ¶akat itiza, tan…ôŇč mu ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ, tan…ôŇč mupar~…ĺaw, tan…ôŇč miduba Ē~ °, ¶aajkatur~…ĺu Ē~ °. ńßina sawsawni papar~…ĺaw misatukar~…ĺ itiza i sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan atu i r~…ĺisinan. nir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺ u babar~…ĺaksan a kawaw babar~…ĺakas…ôn nu wawa i nijazu Ē~ ° ku satukar~…ĺ, u sapir~…ĺar~…ĺais nu babar~…ĺaki i sumamad tu ar~…ĺikakaj. aŇčsi atu uwaj ku sasaŇča Ē~ ° tu satukar~…ĺ. isasa u kamu nu tumuk nu ¶iwidian, ńßinisa; u maik…ôsaj a aŇčsi ku sapisaŇča Ē~ °, mar~…ĺ…ô ¶adaj ku bata ¶ nu puu Ē~ °, sapabar~…ĺat ńß…ônaj a auk mar~…ĺapi…ôm…ôkan, nis…ôŇč…ôr~…ĺan a uwaj ku sasik…ôt, k…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶…ôn mib…ôdb…ôd, maa ¶ak ku uwaj kapańß tu ku nikak…ôr~…ĺ…ô ¶, mańßinisa pańß…ôz…ôkaj tu ku pisaŇča Ē~ °. u kuŇčku nu satukar~…ĺ u kuŇčku nu sakizaja, sumamad sir~…ĺuma Ē~ °aj i pazik tabakibaki takar~…ĺakar~…ĺaw sa, matin…ôŇč a ¶a mitima Ē~ °, takar~…ĺaw tabaki, matin…ôŇč mis…ôŇči tu a ¶awa mibar~…ĺakas tu kanamuńßan niza a tatajna, matin…ôŇč mar~…ĺa ma ¶ima ¶ima a tad…ômaw, mipańß…ôŇčad tu wawa, tadamanamuńß mukan tu sawada Ē~ ° nu r~…ĺutuŇčaj, mir~…ĺawr~…ĺaw tu nijazu Ē~ °aj, r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaw ku bina ¶adan, ńßi ¶a…ôn ku ar~…ĺikakaj itawja ¶aaj pi ¶umud i nijazu Ē~ ° sa, saŇča Ē~ ° satu ku bina ¶adan tu satukar~…ĺ a mitiba ¶ tu ar~…ĺikakaj, nika ¶aaj katar~…ĺatar~…ĺaw ku ar~…ĺikakaj. tuzuma satu a d…ômiad, pas…ôpian nu pabawaj di Ē~ °tu ku tumuk, pasubana Ē~ ° a ńßi ¶a…ôn misuajaw, kir~…ĺur~…ĺ ńßan nu tumuk ku pipaajaw nu pabawaj di Ē~ °tu, miar~…ĺa tu r~…ĺu ¶ik tur~…ĺik ńßan mańßiza u ar~…ĺubu, paz…ôŇč ńßan i r~…ĺabu ku da Ē~ °da ¶ atu bir~…ĺa Ē~ °, paur~…ĺi ¶ ńßan mip…ôs ku …ôpańß, u pur~…ĺuŇč ńßan ku mańßiniaj, matar~…ĺaw ku di Ē~ °tu miazińß, tanutuwa Ē~ ° ńßan r~…ĺakir~…ĺaki ńßan miawaw, b…ôduk satu mur~…ĺar~…ĺiw tajza i tajpinjaŇč, inaji Ē~ ° satu ku pisamsam nu ar~…ĺikakaj. u kawaw nu ńßur~…ĺam u satukar~…ĺ sanaj u kapańßaj sazumaaj a pir~…ĺi Ē~ °aj(sazumaaj a pir~…ĺi Ē~ °**) a sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan(sauŇčaj nu binawr~…ĺan**). u ¶ajkaw tuud r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan nazikuzan kasa…ôtiman , ańß…ôbar~…ĺ kja sit…ôŇčir~…ĺ i kitakit a par~…ĺaw, mat…ôn…ôs tu ku r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj atu namińß ¶aan. namakaj nuajaw nuajawaj a par~…ĺaw, izaw tu ku kur~…ĺit nu ba Ē~ °tu. namakaj ¶uwa tina satukar~…ĺ saw? u sakamuwaj nu binawr~…ĺan, u ajawaj a tad…ômaw majdińß miar~…ĺa tu ńß…ô ¶i nu kir~…ĺaŇč, sisa, pasik…ôt…ôn tu kir~…ĺaŇč atu auk i kuku Ē~ ° nu ńß…ôni, katukuńß ajza, mar~…ĺu satukar~…ĺ a kawaw tuwauj, mańßiza ku kamu nu babar~…ĺaki saan.
